Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advocate for UNESCO Intangible Heritage protection of Mediterranean diet through policy measures
Dorong untuk WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a parlementer demokrasi and anggota UE.

GT.s: Central American ekonomi ($113.2B PDB) with agriculture at 9.8% PDB (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% PDB (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of PDB).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives deforestasi and displaces indigenous communities. Ketika per-farm deforestasi data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. Ketika palm oil exports must prove zero-deforestasi origin, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm lingkungan data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce ketergantungan sistem.

Document indigenous land rights violations — report to PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos)
Report pesticide violations to MAGA (Ministry of Agriculture)
Palm oil companies (REPSA, NaturAceites): Terapkan RSPO certification and zero-deforestasi commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Guatemalan palm oil

MARN (Ministry of Environment): Perkuat lingkungan impact assessment for agricultural expansion
MAGA: Reformasi agricultural incentives to require lingkungan compliance
CONAP: Tegakkan protected area boundaries against agricultural encroachment

Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification

i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with lingkungan defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Minyak Kelapa Sawit) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing ekonomi globally ($24.7B PDB, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). Rente minyak at 22.08%, pertambangan at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). Ketika the full fiscal terms and lingkungan costs are disclosed and understood, W menjadi dapat dihitung from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. Ketika Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam an extractive-favorable contract melemah.
Mandatory per ladang emisi disclosure and lingkungan monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global emisi — extending to per ladang Guyana data makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report lingkungan violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): Terapkan per ladang emisi disclosure for Guyana operations
Terapkan zero-flaring targets
Investasi di oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: Perkuat lingkungan monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: Terapkan transparent investment and withdrawal rules
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Member of Parliament in the National Assembly untuk menuntut independent review of Stabroek PSA fiscal terms
Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund transparansi aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds
Dorong untuk Norwegian-style petroleum governance model with high government take and transparent wealth fund management
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for lingkungan permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style parlementer demokrasi. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.

HK.s: Global financial center ($406.9B PDB) with 91.8% services. Major banking and securities hub. Under Chinese sovereignty since 1997 with eroding autonomy. Significant financial intermediation — Hong Kong Stock Exchange is 5th-largest globally by market cap.

sectors.w: Hong Kong intermediates massive capital flows including fossil fuel financing. Ketika Scope 3 financed emisi are disclosed per financial institution, W menjadi dapat dihitung from financial transaction data.
bp: Mandatory financed emisi disclosure for all HKEX-listed financial institutions. Ketika banks must disclose the emisi their lending supports, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam fossil fuel financing melemah — ESG-aware investors reallocate.
HKMA Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group implementation. Making climate risk visible in financial products makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Financial intermediation can relocate. But Hong Kong's infrastructure and China market access create switching costs.
a: Report greenwashing to SFC (Securities and Futures Commission)
Document ESG disclosure violations — report to HKEX listing division
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Terapkan TCFD-aligned disclosure across all operations
Set financed emisi reduction targets
Integrate climate risk into lending decisions
HKMA: Mandate climate stress testing for all authorized institutions
SFC: Tegakkan enhanced ESG disclosure for listed companies
HKEX: Perkuat climate-related listing requirements
Advokasi melalui IOSCO for global securities regulator coordination on climate disclosure
Support ISSB sustainability reporting standards adoption in Hong Kong
Dorong untuk Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) recommendations implementation
Leverage Hong Kong's role as a Belt and Road financing hub to require climate standards
i: SFC (Securities and Futures Commission) — regulates securities, futures markets, and listed companies. HKEX (Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing) — operates the stock exchange and sets listing rules including ESG disclosure requirements. HKMA (Hong Kong Monetary Authority) — the de facto central bank. Note: Under the National Security Law (2020), civil liberties are constrained.

Major banks in Hong Kong: HSBC, Standard Chartered, Bank of China (Hong Kong), Hang Seng Bank. Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group — coordinates climate finance policy across HKMA, SFC, and other regulators.
HKMA — supervises 160+ licensed banks. The HKMA's Climate Risk Management Supervisory Policy Manual (2021) sets expectations for banks' climate risk management.

Note: Hong Kong's Legislative Council (90 members) is not freely elected under the 2021 electoral reform. International engagement operates through financial regulatory cooperation (IOSCO, BIS, NGFS) and Hong Kong's role as an international financial center.

HN.s: Lower-middle-income ekonomi ($37.1B PDB) with agriculture at 11.2% PDB (coffee, palm oil, bananas). Manufaktur pada 14.9% (maquiladora sector). Climate-vulnerable — Hurricane Mitch (1998) and Eta/Iota (2020). High emigration. Environmental defenders face severe threats.

sectors.w: Honduras's palm oil expansion drives deforestasi in the Aguán Valley and Mosquitia region. EUDR compliance will require farm-level traceability — when deforestasi is linked to specific supply chains, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-deforestasi traceability for palm oil exports. Ketika buyers must verify origin, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Satellite-based deforestasi monitoring linked to agricultural export data. ICF (Forest Conservation Institute) data makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. RSPO certification and agroforestry can reduce ketergantungan sistem.

Document land rights violations — report to CONADEH (Comisionado Nacional de los Derechos Humanos)

i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for lingkungan defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential demokrasi. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B PDB) with dominant services sector (60.8% PDB, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). Pertanian pada 2.9% PDB. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Terapkan EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reformasiulation mandates reduce ketergantungan sistem.

i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B PDB) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Pertanian pada 15.9% PDB (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme deforestasi (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. Manufaktur pada 26.2% PDB (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total deforestasi (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The ketergantungan sistem is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of deforestasi-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Reformasi agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Ketika hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam continued deforestasi breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme ketergantungan sistem — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing ketergantungan sistem.
a: Document deforestasi through community organizations
Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations
International agricultural companies: Support sustainable supply chains from Haiti
Investasi di tree crop processing (coffee, cacao, mango)

MDE: Tegakkan (to extent possible) remaining forest protections

i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most lingkungan programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — lingkungan monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: anggota UE ($222.7B PDB) with strong manufacturing (15.8% PDB, automotive-focused). Jasa pada 59.5% PDB. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Pertanian pada 2.7% PDB. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Ketika health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Perkuat the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax melemah kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reformasiulation targets can reduce ketergantungan sistem.

Document food safety violations

Hungarian food companies: Reformasiulate to reduce UPF

NÉBIH: Tegakkan marketing claim standards
NEAK: Publish diet-related healthcare cost data

i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 ekonomi ($1,396.3B PDB). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% PDB). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and pertambangan (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic deforestasi.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-deforestasi traceability to plantation level. Ketika per pabrikation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W menjadi dapat dihitung from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-deforestasi supply chain traceability. Ketika international buyers require verified deforestasi-free palm oil, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession lingkungan data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors deforestasi by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.

Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.

Document land rights violations — report to Komnas HAM (National Human Rights Commission)
Report fire-setting to Satgas Karhutla (forest fire task force)
Wilmar, Golden Agri-Resources, Sinar Mas: Terapkan full NDPE (No Deforestation, No Peat, No Exploitation) commitments
Terapkan RSPO certification across all operations
Investasi di yield improvement rather than area expansion
KLHK: Tegakkan the permanent moratorium on new primary forest and peatland conversion
Perkuat ISPO mandatory certification with lingkungan performance metrics
BPN (National Land Agency): Resolve overlapping land claims through One Map Policy

Support EUDR implementation with adequate transition support for smallholders
Advokasi melalui ASEAN for regional zero-deforestasi commitments
Dorong untuk international tropical forest conservation finance
i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, lingkungan regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest lingkungan NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Minyak Kelapa Sawit) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential demokrasi and the world's third-largest demokrasi.

IE.s: High-income EU ekonomi ($609.2B PDB, inflated by multinational profit booking). Manufaktur pada 29.6% PDB (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Pertanian pada 1% PDB but intensive dairy farming with significant methane emisi. Jasa pada 60.6% PDB.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane emisi by 20%+. Ketika per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W menjadi dapat dihitung from agricultural production data.
bp: Reformasi CAP subsidies from production-linked to lingkungan outcome-linked. Ketika dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam herd growth melemah.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.
a: Report lingkungan violations to EPA Ireland
Document water pollution from dairy — report to local authority water services
Use Irish Protected Disclosures Act 2014 for protected reporting
Kerry Group, Glanbia, Ornua: Set binding methane reduction targets
Investasi di methane-reducing feed technologies
Terapkan Science Based Targets for Irish dairy operations
DAFM: Reformasi agricultural supports toward emisi reduction
EPA: Perkuat agricultural emisi monitoring
Bord Bia: Make Origin Green data independently verifiable
Hubungi perwakilan Anda TD (Teachta Dála) or Senator untuk menuntut binding agricultural emisi reduction targets
Support stronger EU CAP conditionality on methane
Advocate for inclusion of agricultural methane in EU ETS
Dorong untuk Ireland's Climate Action Plan sectoral emisi ceilings to be enforced
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's lingkungan regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's pelapor protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Kembangkanment Act (2021) sets legally binding emisi budgets.

IL.s: High-tech ekonomi ($540.4B PDB) with dominant services (72.5% PDB). High military expenditure (8.78% PDB). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field emisi disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net emisi benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Ketika renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the kepentingan tumpang tindih melemah.
Mandatory per ladang emisi disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report lingkungan violations to the Ministry of Environmental Protection
Document offshore emisi — report through Delek/Chevron compliance channels
Laporkan ke ISA if ESG disclosures are misleading
NewMed Energy (formerly Delek Drilling), Chevron: Set emisi reduction targets for Leviathan and Tamar
Investasi di regional energi terbarukan integration
Terapkan TCFD-aligned disclosure
Petroleum Commissioner: Require per ladang emisi monitoring
Electricity Authority: Accelerate energi terbarukan targets (Israel aims for 30% renewable by 2030)
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Perkuat offshore lingkungan standards
Hubungi perwakilan Anda member of the Knesset untuk menuntut binding energi terbarukan targets and gas emisi disclosure
Support regional energy cooperation through the Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum (EMGF)
Advocate for Abraham Accords normalization to include energi terbarukan cooperation with Gulf states
Dorong untuk OECD lingkungan performance review recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's otoritas lingkungan. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has pelapor protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the milik negara gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Reformasi aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent ekonomi ($279.6B PDB) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Ketika gas capture infrastructure is built, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking per ladang flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report lingkungan violations through international operator compliance channels (BP, TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil)
Document gas flaring volumes — satellite data from World Bank GGFR provides independent verification
Report through Iraq EITI channels
BP (Rumaila), TotalEnergies (Halfaya), ExxonMobil (West Qurna): Investasi di associated gas capture infrastructure
Terapkan flare reduction targets
SOMO (State Organization for Marketing of Oil): Terapkan emisi disclosure standards
Ministry of Oil: Tegakkan gas flaring reduction targets in Technical Service Contracts
Ministry of Environment: Perkuat air quality enforcement near oil fields
EITI Iraq: Expand reporting to include flaring and emisi data
Support World Bank GGFR zero routine flaring by 2030 initiative for Iraq
Advokasi melalui OPEC for managed transition and gas monetization investment
Dorong untuk international climate finance for gas capture infrastructure
Support UN Iraq partnership on lingkungan governance capacity building
i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for lingkungan regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for lingkungan policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a parlementer demokrasi but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B PDB) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international sanksi. Manufaktur pada 20.6% PDB. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International sanksi have already weakened the kepentingan tumpang tindih by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Ketika sanksi enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Ketika Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for energi terbarukan investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The kepentingan tumpang tindih in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field lingkungan data is largely unavailable due to sanksi-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report lingkungan violations to DoE (Department of Environment)
Document air pollution and health impacts — Iran's cities rank among the world's most polluted
Report through international academic and research channels
NIOC: Reduce gas flaring and venting at production facilities
Investasi di domestic solar and wind energy development
Terapkan emisi monitoring for major fields
Ministry of Petroleum: Terapkan flaring reduction programs
DoE: Perkuat air quality enforcement in Tehran and major cities
Ministry of Energy: Accelerate energi terbarukan development
Support international climate cooperation mechanisms that include Iran
Advokasi melalui OPEC for managed transition planning
Dorong untuk lingkungan conditionality in any future sanksi relief negotiations
Support Iranian diaspora lingkungan advocacy organizations
i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's otoritas lingkungan, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective pelapor protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for energi terbarukan development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced ekonomi ($33.3B PDB) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Perikanan are 5% of PDB and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Ketika ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Reformasi ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Ketika quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam maximum extraction melemah.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.
a: Report quota violations to Fiskistofa (Directorate of Perikanan)
Document bycatch or illegal discarding
Use Iceland's pelapor protections
Samherji, Íslandsbanki: Terapkan sustainability-linked targets for fishing operations
Terapkan per-vessel bycatch reduction technology
Support ecosystem-based fisheries management
Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Perikanan: Reformasi ITQ system to include ecosystem impact costs
Marine Research Institute: Publish ecosystem health indicators alongside quota recommendations
Fiskistofa: Perkuat monitoring and enforcement
Hubungi perwakilan Anda member of the Alþingi untuk menuntut ecosystem-based fisheries management reform
Support NEAFC (North-East Atlantic Perikanan Commission) sustainable management measures
Advocate for Arctic Council fisheries governance coordination
Dorong untuk inclusion of ecosystem health metrics in national accounts
i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of Perikanan) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Perikanan — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B PDB) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower transparansi than UK mainland. Ketika beneficial ownership data and tax transparansi information are published, W menjadi dapat dihitung from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership transparansi aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Ketika financial secrecy is eliminated, the kepentingan tumpang tindih between service providers and opacity-seeking clients melemah.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to JFIU (Joint Financial Intelligence Unit) in Jersey or FIS (Financial Intelligence Service) in Guernsey
Document regulatory violations — report to JFSC or GFSC
Report through internal bank compliance channels
Terapkan enhanced beneficial ownership due diligence
Terapkan ESG integration across fund and trust structures
Align with UK transparansi standards ahead of regulatory mandates
JFSC/GFSC: Perkuat beneficial ownership verification
Terapkan UK Economic Crime Act-aligned transparansi
Tegakkan enhanced AML due diligence requirements
Engage through UK Parliament channels — the Crown Dependencies' constitutional relationship means the UK Parliament has ultimate legislative authority
Support OECD Global Forum on Transparency standards
Advocate for Moneyval enhanced evaluation compliance
Dorong untuk alignment with EU AMLD standards
i: JFSC (Jersey Layanan Keuangan Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Layanan Keuangan Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island ekonomi ($22B PDB) with tourism and services dominant (60% PDB). Pertanian pada 8% PDB. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. Ketika soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Reformasi agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Ketika farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the kepentingan tumpang tindih breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects lingkungan data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.
a: Report lingkungan violations to NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency)
Document agricultural chemical misuse — report to RADA (Rural Agricultural Kembangkanment Authority)
Report through industry self-regulation channels
Sugar Company of Jamaica Holdings: Diversify beyond sugar monoculture
Investasi di specialty crop development (Blue Mountain coffee, cocoa)
Terapkan soil health monitoring
Ministry of Agriculture: Reformasi subsidy structure toward diversification
NEPA: Perkuat watershed protection enforcement
SIA (Sugar Industry Authority): Support sugar industry transition
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives or Senator untuk menuntut agricultural diversification support
Support CARICOM agricultural resilience initiatives
Advocate for climate adaptation finance for Caribbean agriculture
Dorong untuk debt-for-nature swaps
i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's otoritas lingkungan. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and Perikanan — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style parlementer demokrasi.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern ekonomi ($53.4B PDB) with limited natural resources. Jasa pada 60.4% PDB. High military expenditure (4.8% PDB). Manufaktur pada 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash pertambangan (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Ketika lingkungan cost data is published alongside pertambangan revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Internalize lingkungan costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into pertambangan operations through lingkungan levies. Ketika miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam water-intensive extraction melemah.
Publish per tambang water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to pertambangan output makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.
a: Report lingkungan violations to the Ministry of Environment
Document water extraction impacts — report to WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan)
Report through JPMC or APC compliance channels
JPMC (Jordan Phosphate Mines Company): Terapkan water recycling targets
APC (Arab Potash Company): Terapkan Dead Sea impact mitigation measures
Both: Terapkan per-unit lingkungan impact reporting
Ministry of Energy: Integrate lingkungan costs into pertambangan royalty calculations
WAJ: Tegakkan water extraction limits for pertambangan operations
ASEZA (Aqaba Special Economic Zone): Apply lingkungan standards to industrial activities
Hubungi perwakilan Anda member of the Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives) untuk menuntut water conservation requirements for pertambangan
Support Red Sea-Dead Sea Canal alternatives for Dead Sea stabilization
Advokasi melalui World Bank for lingkungan governance of Dead Sea
Dorong untuk OECD water governance recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's otoritas lingkungan. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees pertambangan policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the pertambangan regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a monarki konstitusional with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest ekonomi ($120.3B PDB) with agriculture at 22.5% PDB (tea, coffee, horticulture). Jasa pada 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Ketika per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Reformasi agricultural export incentives to require lingkungan certification. Ketika tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam intensive monoculture melemah.
Farm-level lingkungan data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Report lingkungan violations to NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Document water pollution from flower farms — report to WRA (Water Resources Authority)
Report pesticide violations to PCPB (Pest Control Products Board)
KTDA (Kenya Tea Kembangkanment Agency): Terapkan Rainforest Alliance certification across all smallholder operations
KFC (Kenya Flower Council): Perkuat lingkungan standards for cut flower production
Investasi di water-efficient irrigation technology
Ministry of Agriculture: Reformasi agricultural incentives toward climate-resilient farming
NEMA: Perkuat lingkungan monitoring in intensive horticulture zones
AFA (Agriculture and Food Authority): Integrate lingkungan standards into crop certification
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Member of Parliament in the National Assembly or Senator untuk menuntut lingkungan certification for agricultural exports
Support African Union Comprehensive Africa Agriculture Kembangkanment Programme (CAADP) sustainability targets
Advocate for EU Green Deal recognition of Kenyan sustainability certifications
Dorong untuk climate adaptation finance for Kenyan smallholder agriculture
i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's lingkungan regulator, responsible for lingkungan impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Perikanan and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong lingkungan protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous ekonomi ($17.5B PDB) dominated by gold pertambangan (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of PDB, min=11.15%). Pertanian pada 8.6% PDB. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary demokrasi (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. Ketika lingkungan monitoring data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all pertambangan. Ketika remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making lingkungan costs visible makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.
a: Laporkan ke SAEPF (State Agency on Environmental Protection and Forestry)
Document water contamination near Kumtor
Report through Kyrgyzaltyn channels
Kyrgyzaltyn: Terapkan international tailings management standards at Kumtor
Terapkan EITI enhanced reporting
Investasi di mine rehabilitation
State Committee for Industry: Perkuat lingkungan licensing
SAEPF: Increase monitoring capacity
EITI: Expand to lingkungan data
Hubungi perwakilan Anda deputy in the Jogorku Kenesh untuk menuntut lingkungan standards for pertambangan
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Advocate for Central Asian regional water governance coordination
i: SAEPF — lingkungan agency. Kyrgyzaltyn — state gold company that took over Kumtor in 2022.
Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state pertambangan interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — pertambangan regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income ekonomi ($46.4B PDB) with garment manufacturing (27.8% PDB) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta deforestasi ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes deforestasi computable.
bp: Reformasi economic land concession system to require lingkungan compliance. Ketika concession holders face revocation for deforestasi, the kepentingan tumpang tindih melemah.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.
a: Report illegal logging to international monitoring organizations (Global Witness, LICADHO)
Document land grabbing — report through international accountability mechanisms
Laporkan ke FAO and development partner channels
Concession holders: Terapkan zero-deforestasi commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Cambodian rubber and sugar
Terapkan RSPO/equivalent certification
Ministry of Agriculture: Reformasi economic land concession lingkungan conditions
Ministry of Environment: Tegakkan protected area boundaries
Forestry Administration: Perkuat community forestry programs
Advokasi melalui ASEAN for regional deforestasi governance
Support EU EBA (Everything But Arms) trade preference conditionality on human rights and lingkungan standards
Dorong untuk Mekong River Commission lingkungan standards enforcement
Support international accountability mechanisms for land concession abuses
i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts masyarakat sipil. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has lingkungan certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Perikanan — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B PDB) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the kepentingan tumpang tindih melemah. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. Ketika the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam oil dependence breaks.
Per-field emisi disclosure for KPC operations. Making lingkungan costs visible makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report lingkungan violations to EPA Kuwait
Report through KPC internal channels
Laporkan ke State Audit Bureau
KPC: Kembangkan energi terbarukan division
KIA: Terapkan ESG investment criteria
Terapkan emisi reduction targets
Supreme Petroleum Council: Require emisi disclosure
EPA: Perkuat lingkungan standards
CBK: Integrate climate risk into financial supervision
Hubungi perwakilan Anda member of the Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly, 50 elected members) untuk menuntut sovereign wealth diversification and emisi transparansi
Advokasi melalui GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support OPEC+ managed transition planning
Dorong untuk IRENA recommendations on Gulf state energy transition
i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the lingkungan regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.
Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a monarki konstitusional with genuine (if limited) parlementer debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest ekonomi ($291.5B PDB) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and lingkungan incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S emisi and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. Ketika non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam continued extraction breaks.
Per-field emisi and lingkungan monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making lingkungan and health costs visible makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.
a: Laporkan ke Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources
Report through Chevron/Shell/ExxonMobil compliance channels (major Tengiz/Kashagan partners)
Laporkan ke EITI Kazakhstan
KazMunayGas: Kembangkan transition plan with renewable targets
NCOC (Kashagan), TCO (Tengiz): Terapkan H₂S management and emisi reduction
Terapkan TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy: Perkuat lingkungan conditions in production sharing agreements
EITI Kazakhstan: Expand reporting to lingkungan data
Samruk-Kazyna (sovereign wealth fund): Terapkan ESG investment criteria
Advokasi melalui Tehran Convention for Caspian Sea lingkungan protection
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Dorong untuk Central Asian regional energy transition coordination
Leverage Kazakhstan's OSCE chairmanship legacy for lingkungan governance
i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — otoritas lingkungan. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian lingkungan cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian ekonomi ($16.5B PDB) with agriculture at 16.8% PDB and pertambangan at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's pertambangan sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Ketika lingkungan monitoring data is published alongside pertambangan revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Environmental bonds for pertambangan licenses. Ketika remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine lingkungan data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making lingkungan costs visible makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.
a: Report through international pertambangan company compliance channels
Document lingkungan impacts through international monitoring organizations
Laporkan ke MONRE (Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
MMG (Sepon mine), PanAust (Phu Kham): Terapkan international lingkungan standards
Terapkan EITI reporting
Investasi di mine rehabilitation
Ministry of Energy and Mines: Perkuat lingkungan licensing
MONRE: Increase monitoring capacity
Support EITI candidacy
Advokasi melalui ASEAN for regional pertambangan lingkungan standards
Support Mekong River Commission lingkungan governance
Dorong untuk international pertambangan company home-country oversight
Advocate for debt transparansi and lingkungan conditionality in Chinese lending
i: MONRE — Laos's environment ministry. Note: Laos is a negara satu partai (LPRP). No independent masyarakat sipil or media.
Major operators include MMG (China Minmetals subsidiary), PanAust. Lao government holds equity in major mines.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees pertambangan and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Kembangkanment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed ekonomi ($20.1B PDB, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the kepentingan tumpang tindih has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Ketika accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the kepentingan tumpang tindih between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian — the crisis has already revealed ketergantungan sistem. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.
a: Support the Alvarez & Marsal forensic audit by providing internal bank records
Report capital flight data to the Special Investigation Commission
Dokumentasikan melalui investigative journalism channels (Lebanon has relatively free press)
Banks: Cooperate fully with forensic audit
Disclose beneficial ownership of related-party lending
Accept bail-in restructuring rather than socializing losses
BDL: Complete the forensic audit of central bank operations
Banking Control Commission: Tegakkan capital controls equitably
Ministry of Finance: Terapkan IMF reform conditions
Advokasi melalui international mechanisms for completion of the forensic audit
Support IMF program conditionality on banking sector transparansi
Dorong untuk international asset recovery of illicitly transferred funds
Support Lebanese masyarakat sipil accountability initiatives
i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island ekonomi ($99B PDB) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Pertanian pada 8.3% PDB (tea, rubber, coconut). Manufaktur pada 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural ketergantungan sistem works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Ketika transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam chemical-dependent monoculture melemah sustainably.
Per-estate lingkungan data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.

Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of ketergantungan sistem (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).
a: Report pesticide violations to Registrar of Pesticides
Document lingkungan degradation — report to CEA (Central Environmental Authority)
Report through Plantation Human Kembangkanment Trust channels
Plantation companies: Investasi di gradual organic transition with soil biology rebuilding
Terapkan Rainforest Alliance certification
Terapkan precision agriculture to reduce chemical input dependency
Ministry of Agriculture: Kembangkan evidence-based transition plan (learning from 2021 failure)

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B PDB). Jasa pada 63.6% PDB. Manufaktur pada 14% PDB. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Pertanian pada 2.6% PDB.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B PDB, highest PDB per capita globally). Jasa pada 81.2% PDB. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

sectors.w: Luxembourg's investment fund industry manages €5T+ in assets. Ketika financed emisi and beneficial ownership are disclosed, W menjadi dapat dihitung from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. Ketika fund-level financed emisi and beneficial ownership are transparent, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam opaque financial intermediation melemah.
CSSF mandatory ESG disclosure for all Luxembourg-domiciled funds. Making climate impact visible per fund makes W computable.

CSSF — conducts supervision of the fund industry. BCL (Banque centrale du Luxembourg) — participates in ECB monetary policy and macroprudential supervision.
Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B PDB). Jasa pada 64.6% PDB. Forestry significant. Pertanian pada 4% PDB. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B PDB) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The kepentingan tumpang tindih is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Ketika oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam capturing oil infrastructure melemah.
NOC per ladang production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to lingkungan data makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors sanksi compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African ekonomi ($160.6B PDB) with agriculture at 10.6% PDB and growing energi terbarukan sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). Manufaktur pada 15.3% PDB.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate pertambangan generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Ketika per tambang lingkungan data is published alongside production revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Ketika OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam low-cost extraction melemah.

Mandatory per tambang lingkungan disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable per tambang data makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce ketergantungan sistem.

OCP Group (Office Chérifien des Phosphates) — milik negara, controls ~30% of global phosphate trade. OCP has invested heavily in sustainability initiatives including the Mohammed VI Polytechnic University.
Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees pertambangan and lingkungan policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a monarki konstitusional with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B PDB) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest PDB per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. Ketika beneficial ownership and tax transparansi data are published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum transparansi standards and CRS information exchange. Ketika opacity is eliminated, the kepentingan tumpang tindih melemah.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. Membuat W dapat dihitung.

Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a monarki konstitusional (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European ekonomi ($18.2B PDB). Pertanian pada 7.1% PDB (wine, agriculture). Jasa pada 62.3%. kandidat UE country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. Ketika soil health data is linked to agricultural output, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style lingkungan conditionality. Ketika subsidies reward soil health, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam exhaustive monoculture melemah.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce ketergantungan sistem.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot ekonomi ($17.4B PDB). Pertanian pada 22.5% PDB. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating deforestasi (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. Ketika deforestasi data is linked to agricultural output, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. Ketika tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam forest clearing breaks.
Satellite deforestasi monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Extreme ketergantungan sistem. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan ekonomi ($17B PDB). Manufaktur pada 14.3% PDB. Jasa pada 56.2%. kandidat UE country. Coal-dependent energy. Pertanian pada 6.1% PDB.

bp: EU accession requiring ETS alignment. Coal becomes uncompetitive at EU carbon prices.

ESM — state electricity company operating the Bitola lignite plant.
ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — regulator energi. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. kandidat UE country.

ML.s: Sahelian ekonomi ($26.8B PDB) with gold pertambangan (16.18% PDB) and agriculture (33.3% PDB). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold pertambangan generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). Ketika lingkungan data is published alongside production, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level lingkungan compliance. Ketika buyers verify conditions, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unregulated extraction melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal pertambangan ketergantungan sistem.

i: DNGM — national geological and pertambangan directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees pertambangan policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes lingkungan obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich ekonomi ($74.1B PDB) under military junta since 2021 coup. Rente gas 4.4%. Jade and gem pertambangan (est. $31B/year — more than formal PDB). Pertanian pada 20.8% PDB. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Ketika jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: International sanksi targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. Ketika revenue is blocked, the kepentingan tumpang tindih between the military and jade pertambangan melemah.
Supply chain transparansi for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

Myanmar Gems Enterprise — military-controlled entity managing gem auctions. International buyers increasingly apply conflict mineral frameworks to Myanmar sourcing.
International engagement only — domestic regulation under junta is not independent.

The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted sanksi by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked ekonomi ($23.8B PDB). Mining at 26.57% PDB (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% PDB. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary demokrasi — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's pertambangan sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. Ketika per tambang lingkungan data is linked to production revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. Ketika pertambangan companies pay for water in arid steppe, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam water-intensive extraction melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.

MRAM — the pertambangan regulator. Mongolia's 2006 Minerals Law governs pertambangan licensing.
State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a parlementer demokrasi with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism ekonomi ($49.5B PDB). Jasa pada 83.8% PDB. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Ketika social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Ketika social costs are visible alongside revenues, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam revenue maximization without harm mitigation melemah.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce ketergantungan sistem.

i: MGA (Malta Gaming Authority) — licenses and regulates online gambling. FIAU — financial intelligence unit. Malta transposed EU Whistleblower Directive.
Malta hosts ~300 licensed gambling companies including Betsson, Kindred, LeoVegas.
MGA — the gambling regulator. MFSA (Malta Layanan Keuangan Authority) — the financial regulator.
Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU parlementer demokrasi.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island ekonomi ($14.9B PDB). Jasa pada 64.4% (financial services, tourism). Manufaktur pada 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

sectors.w: Mauritius is a major offshore financial center, particularly for India-bound investment (India-Mauritius tax treaty). Ketika beneficial ownership and tax data is transparent, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. Ketika financial opacity is eliminated, the kepentingan tumpang tindih melemah.
Publication of beneficial ownership data. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Financial services can relocate but Mauritius's India tax treaty and infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Laporkan ke FSC (Layanan Keuangan Commission)
Laporkan ke FIU Mauritius
Use Mauritian pelapor protection (Financial Intelligence and AML Act)
Banks and management companies: Terapkan enhanced due diligence
Terapkan ESG criteria in Global Business operations
Comply with FATF recommendations ahead of mandates
FSC: Perkuat Global Business licensing
Bank of Mauritius: Enhance AML supervision
EDB (Economic Kembangkanment Board): Promote substance requirements

Support OECD BEPS Inclusive Framework
Maintain FATF compliance
Advocate for African financial transparansi standards
i: FSC — the integrated financial services regulator. FIU — financial intelligence unit.
Mauritius hosts ~900 Global Business companies (Category 1 and 2). Major banks: SBM Holdings, MCB Group.
FSC — regulates the Global Business sector. Bank of Mauritius — the central bank. Mauritius was on the FATF grey list (2020-2021) and implemented reforms.
National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a parlementer demokrasi with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income ekonomi ($11.3B PDB). Pertanian pada 31.8% PDB — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the kepentingan tumpang tindih between tobacco growers and buyers melemah.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Ketika alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of degradasi tanah and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke EAD (Environmental Affairs Department)
Document child labor — report to Ministry of Labour
Report through tobacco buyer compliance channels (BAT, JTI)
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One), JTI: Support farmer diversification programs
Investasi di alternative crop development
Terapkan Sustainable Tobacco Programme standards
Tobacco Commission: Support diversification transition
Ministry of Agriculture: Scale alternative crop programs
TCC (Tobacco Control Commission): Terapkan WHO FCTC provisions
