Support WHO FCTC alternative livelihood provisions for tobacco-growing countries
Advocate for international climate finance for agricultural transition
Dorong untuk fair trade tobacco pricing during transition period
i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — otoritas lingkungan. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water Kembangkanment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential demokrasi. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income ekonomi ($422.2B PDB). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). Manufaktur pada 22.5% PDB (electronics, automotive). Jasa pada 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. Ketika per pabrikation lingkungan data is linked to trade, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-deforestasi traceability. Ketika buyers verify origin, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Minyak Kelapa Sawit) certification with independently verifiable lingkungan data per estate. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.
a: Laporkan ke DOE (Department of Environment)
Document labor violations — report to HR Ministry
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Sime Darby, IOI, FGV: Achieve 100% RSPO certification
Terapkan zero-deforestasi and no-peat commitments
Terapkan full supply chain traceability
MPOB: Perkuat MSPO certification lingkungan criteria
DOE: Tegakkan peatland drainage regulations
MPIC (Ministry of Plantation Industries): Mandate full traceability
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Ahli Parlimen in the Dewan Rakyat (222 members) untuk menuntut peatland protection enforcement
Support EUDR implementation with transition assistance for smallholders
Advokasi melalui ASEAN for regional zero-deforestasi commitments
Dorong untuk RSPO-MSPO mutual recognition with enhanced lingkungan standards
i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — otoritas lingkungan. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian Minyak Kelapa Sawit Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Minyak Kelapa Sawit) — the national mandatory certification scheme.
Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal monarki konstitusional and parlementer demokrasi.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing ekonomi ($22.7B PDB). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Pertanian pada 25.2% PDB. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Ketika per-project lingkungan and social cost data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and lingkungan standards. Ketika development is linked to social outcomes, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam extraction without accountability melemah.
Per-project lingkungan disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.
a: Laporkan ke MITADER (Ministry of Land, Environment and Rural Kembangkanment)
Document community displacement — report to international accountability mechanisms
Report through TotalEnergies/ExxonMobil/Eni compliance channels

Terapkan TCFD reporting

INP: Perkuat lingkungan licensing for LNG projects

Support EITI enhanced reporting for Mozambique's gas sector
Advocate for Cabo Delgado stabilization with lingkungan governance
Dorong untuk sovereign wealth fund establishment before major LNG revenues flow
i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited pelapor protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates masyarakat sipil operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and pertambangan policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income ekonomi ($13.4B PDB) with pertambangan at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Pertanian pada 7.3% PDB. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium pertambangan (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Ketika per tambang lingkungan monitoring is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium pertambangan. Ketika miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam water-intensive extraction melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring disclosure. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Uranium pertambangan generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate ketergantungan sistem.

Laporkan ke NRPA (National Radiation Protection Authority)

Support IAEA lingkungan standards for uranium producing countries
Advocate for African Mining Vision implementation
Dorong untuk Namibia's green hydrogen strategy to include pertambangan sector transition
i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong masyarakat sipil for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese milik negara). Namibia also has significant diamond pertambangan (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees pertambangan policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential demokrasi with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian ekonomi ($19.9B PDB). Pertanian pada 34.5% PDB. Uranium pertambangan (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium pertambangan (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Ketika remediation costs are pre-funded, kepentingan tumpang tindih in extraction without accountability melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Uranium pertambangan generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate ketergantungan sistem.

Dokumentasikan melalui international monitoring (Greenpeace, CRIIRAD have conducted independent monitoring at Arlit)

Address legacy contamination

i: BNEE (Bureau National d'Évaluation Environnementale) — lingkungan assessment authority. Note: Military rule since July 2023.
Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees pertambangan policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American ekonomi ($19.7B PDB). Pertanian pada 14.4% PDB. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Jasa pada 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold pertambangan generates mercury and cyanide contamination. Ketika lingkungan data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.

i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — otoritas lingkungan. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly otoriter. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — pertambangan regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian ekonomi ($42.9B PDB). Pertanian pada 21.9% PDB. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of PDB. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Ketika per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Reformasi agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Ketika hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unsustainable cultivation melemah.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce ketergantungan sistem.

Report through local government channels (municipality/rural municipality)
Agricultural companies: Support terracing and agroforestry programs

i: DoE — otoritas lingkungan under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Kembangkanment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced ekonomi ($260.2B PDB) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Pertanian pada 4.4% PDB but outsized lingkungan footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Jasa pada 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Ketika per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Terapkan the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Ketika farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam herd expansion melemah.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.

Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: Laporkan ke regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: Terapkan binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
Terapkan methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: Tegakkan NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): Reformasi farm support toward lingkungan outcomes
EPA: Perkuat agricultural chemical regulation

Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural emisi (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) lingkungan provisions
Dorong untuk inclusion of biological methane in national emisi reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary lingkungan regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national lingkungan policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong pelapor protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve lingkungan bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf ekonomi ($107.1B PDB) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Kembangkanment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Ketika hydrogen revenue streams are established, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam oil dependence melemah.
Per-field emisi disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Laporkan ke Environment Authority
Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate energi terbarukan integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): Kembangkan green hydrogen export capacity
Terapkan TCFD reporting

Dorong untuk Oman Vision 2040 lingkungan targets enforcement
i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's lingkungan regulator. PDO (Petroleum Kembangkanment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing parlementer activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant ekonomi ($86.5B PDB) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Jasa pada 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá pertambangan contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The kepentingan tumpang tindih between the pertambangan company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of pertambangan contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the kepentingan tumpang tindih through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing ketergantungan sistem.
a: Report lingkungan violations during mine closure to MiAmbiente (Ministry of Environment)
Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and lingkungan remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive lingkungan remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit pertambangan revenue management
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) untuk menuntut comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign lingkungan decisions
Dorong untuk ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on lingkungan sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — otoritas lingkungan. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the pertambangan contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees pertambangan concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich ekonomi ($289.2B PDB) with pertambangan at 12.1% PDB (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Pertanian pada 7.3%. Jasa pada 51.3%. Social conflicts around pertambangan are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's pertambangan sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Ketika lingkungan monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Ketika indigenous communities can effectively negotiate lingkungan conditions, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam extraction without consent melemah.
Mandatory per tambang lingkungan monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's pertambangan lingkungan standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: Laporkan ke OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through pertambangan company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: Terapkan community development agreements
Terapkan international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish per tambang lingkungan data
OEFA: Increase lingkungan monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: Perkuat lingkungan conditions in pertambangan concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): Tegakkan water quality standards downstream of mines
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) untuk menuntut enforcement of consulta previa and lingkungan monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
Dorong untuk EITI enhanced reporting with lingkungan data
i: OEFA — Peru's lingkungan enforcement agency for the pertambangan sector, conducting inspections and imposing sanksi. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts lingkungan impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and pertambangan ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island ekonomi ($31.8B PDB). Mining at 14.41% PDB, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Pertanian pada 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's pertambangan sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic lingkungan damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory lingkungan bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Ketika remediation is pre-funded, kepentingan tumpang tindih in low-cost disposal melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups

Advokasi melalui Pacific Islands Forum for regional lingkungan standards
Dorong untuk international accountability for pertambangan legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's otoritas lingkungan. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — pertambangan regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the pertambangan regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a monarki konstitusional (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style parlementer demokrasi.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian ekonomi ($461.6B PDB). Jasa pada 63.2% PDB. Pertanian pada 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Manufaktur pada 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel pertambangan (for EV batteries) generates significant lingkungan damage on small islands. Ketika per tambang lingkungan data is linked to nickel exports, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for pertambangan permits. President Duterte's 2017 pertambangan audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: Laporkan ke DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through masyarakat sipil organizations
Laporkan ke Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: Terapkan international lingkungan standards
Terapkan responsible pertambangan certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: Perkuat lingkungan monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require lingkungan bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): Tegakkan pollution standards
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator untuk menuntut enforcement of pertambangan lingkungan standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced lingkungan protections
Advokasi melalui ASEAN for regional pertambangan standards
Dorong untuk EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages pertambangan regulation. Philippines has relatively active masyarakat sipil and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs pertambangan operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential demokrasi.

PK.s: Large ekonomi ($371.6B PDB) with agriculture at 23.7% PDB (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Manufaktur pada 13.2%. Jasa pada 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Ketika per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Reformasi agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Ketika farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam water-intensive monoculture melemah.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power Kembangkanment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: Kembangkan water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
Investasi di drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: Reformasi water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): Tegakkan provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification

Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
Dorong untuk international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal otoritas lingkungan. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own lingkungan agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal parlementer demokrasi.

PL.s: Major EU ekonomi ($917.8B PDB) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Manufaktur pada 16.1% PDB. Jasa pada 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Ketika full carbon costs are internalized, the kepentingan tumpang tindih between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The kepentingan tumpang tindih breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant emisi and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.
a: Laporkan ke GIOŚ (Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection)
Document health impacts in pertambangan regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish pelapor law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)
PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: Kembangkan coal phase-out plans with worker transition
Investasi di offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
Terapkan per-unit emisi reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): Reformasi tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: Terapkan National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat untuk menuntut accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
Dorong untuk territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief lingkungan inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal pertambangan company (milik negara, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the regulator energi. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the lingkungan fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with pertambangan unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B PDB) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of PDB — among world's highest pharma concentration). Jasa pada 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Ketika diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Reformasi food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Ketika imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam high-margin processed imports melemah.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: Laporkan ke FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal pelapor protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
Terapkan voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: Terapkan nutrition education and labelling requirements

Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
Dorong untuk local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal pelapor protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B PDB, severely constrained by occupation). Pertanian pada 7.4% PDB. Jasa pada 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Ketika water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Ketika Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam restricting agricultural development melemah.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme ketergantungan sistem. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
Laporkan ke international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
Investasi di water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document lingkungan impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
Advokasi melalui UN for equitable water allocation
Dorong untuk World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian otoritas lingkungan. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU ekonomi ($313.3B PDB). Jasa pada 66.3% PDB. Pertanian pada 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). Manufaktur pada 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Terapkan EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Not fully breakable. Reformasiulation mandates reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese pelapor law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: Reformasiulate products
Terapkan front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): Terapkan labelling
ASAE: Tegakkan marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) untuk menuntut health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's pelapor protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a parlementer demokrasi.

PY.s: Landlocked South American ekonomi ($44.5B PDB). Pertanian pada 10.7% PDB (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Manufaktur pada 19% PDB. Jasa pada 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe deforestasi from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco deforestasi. Ketika per-farm deforestasi and degradasi tanah data is linked to soy exports, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-deforestasi soy. Ketika EU buyers require verified deforestasi-free origin, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based deforestasi monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce degradasi tanah.
a: Report illegal deforestasi to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): Terapkan zero-deforestasi soy sourcing for Paraguay
Terapkan Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
Investasi di yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: Tegakkan the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate lingkungan standards into soy export certification
INFONA: Perkuat forest monitoring and enforcement
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional untuk menuntut extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur lingkungan provisions enforcement
Dorong untuk indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where deforestasi continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated ekonomi ($219.2B PDB). Industri pada 58.2% PDB. Rente minyak 15.28% PDB, gas rents 12.01% PDB — world's largest LNG exporter. Jasa pada 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ emisi globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Ketika importers reduce LNG dependence, the kepentingan tumpang tindih melemah.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam fossil gas dependence melemah.
Per-field emisi and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle emisi.
a: Laporkan ke QatarEnergy HSE division
Dokumentasikan melalui international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
Laporkan ke Ministry of Environment and Climate Change

Reduce routine flaring to zero

Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate emisi reduction targets
Advokasi melalui GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional emisi standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments

Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — milik negara, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — lingkungan regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: anggota UE ekonomi ($382.6B PDB). Manufaktur pada 13.2% PDB. Rente gas 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Jasa pada 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite anggota UEship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Ketika soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Ketika subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam exhaustive monoculture melemah.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce ketergantungan sistem.

Dokumentasikan melalui Agent Green or EuroNatur

Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
Advokasi melalui European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian lingkungan NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — lingkungan protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). anggota UE since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan ekonomi ($90.1B PDB). Manufaktur pada 12.7%. Rente batubara 0.24% PDB — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. kandidat UE country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant emisi and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: Laporkan ke Ministry of Environmental Protection
Dokumentasikan melalui CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable Kembangkanment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): Kembangkan lignite phase-out roadmap
Investasi di solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara pertambangan basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): Reformasi tariffs to reflect lingkungan costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: Terapkan Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: Tegakkan compliance

Support EU accession lingkungan chapter benchmarks
Advokasi melalui Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
Dorong untuk EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — otoritas lingkungan. CEKOR — Serbian lingkungan NGO. RES Foundation — energi terbarukan advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara pertambangan basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — regulator energi. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. kandidat UE country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon ekonomi ($2,173.8B PDB). Rente minyak 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, pertambangan 2.05% PDB. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Belanja militer 7.05% PDB. Authoritarian governance under international sanksi since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western sanksi and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the kepentingan tumpang tindih.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Ketika importers eliminate dependence, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced transparansi — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to sanksi enforcement authorities
Dokumentasikan melalui investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: Tegakkan sanksi compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: Perkuat enforcement against evasion
EU: Close sanksi loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international sanksi on Russian fossil fuel revenues
Advocate for G7 price cap enforcement strengthening
Dorong untuk addressing Russia's shadow fleet lingkungan risks in Arctic and Baltic
Support EU energy diversification to permanently reduce Russian gas dependence
i: Note: Russia's domestic masyarakat sipil is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian lingkungan issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU sanksi packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — sanksi enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international sanksi coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African ekonomi ($14.3B PDB). Pertanian pada 24.6% PDB. Rente hutan 3.97%. Jasa pada 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but otoriter governance. Strong lingkungan policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and degradasi tanah. Ketika soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the kepentingan tumpang tindih.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
Dokumentasikan melalui RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources Kembangkanment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: Terapkan terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export Kembangkanment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: Tegakkan hillside protection zones
RLMUA (Rwanda Land Management and Use Authority): Integrate erosion data into land management
Engage through available parlementer channels — note that Rwanda's legislature has limited independence from the executive
Support Great Lakes lingkungan cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union lingkungan governance frameworks
i: REMA — the lingkungan management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes lingkungan sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected ekonomi ($49.7B PDB). Pertanian pada 22.2% PDB. Mining 6.63% (gold). Rente minyak 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold pertambangan uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Ketika gold revenue flows are traced, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Ketika refiners verify provenance, the kepentingan tumpang tindih between armed groups and gold revenues melemah.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Artisanal pertambangan uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
Dokumentasikan melalui INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: Terapkan enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International sanksi bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council sanksi on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
Dorong untuk UAE cooperation on gold trade transparansi
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal pertambangan
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors sanksi and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal pertambangan and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Kembangkanment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic ekonomi ($603.7B PDB). Manufaktur pada 13% PDB. Mining 1% PDB (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Jasa pada 66.4%. Strong lingkungan regulations. anggota UE. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore pertambangan (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Ketika per tambang lingkungan and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and lingkungan remediation. Ketika LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam low-cost extraction melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that pertambangan's downstream ketergantungan sistem on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: Laporkan ke Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
Laporkan ke Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
Dokumentasikan melalui Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: Terapkan enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: Perkuat lingkungan conditions in pertambangan permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous lingkungan review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into pertambangan assessments
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) untuk menuntut indigenous consent requirements in pertambangan permits
Advokasi melalui EU Critical Raw Materials Act for lingkungan and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Dorong untuk EU taxonomy alignment of pertambangan lingkungan standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — lingkungan protection agency. Bergsstaten — the pertambangan inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — milik negara iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals pertambangan and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized lingkungan courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs pertambangan permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a monarki konstitusional and anggota UE.

SG.s: Advanced city-state ekonomi ($547.4B PDB). Jasa pada 73% PDB. Manufaktur pada 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Ketika refinery emisi and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's pajak karbon rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Ketika refining margins incorporate carbon costs, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unpriced emisi melemah.
Per-refinery emisi and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce ketergantungan sistem over time.
a: Laporkan ke NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS pelapor channels for financial misconduct
Dokumentasikan melalui SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Terapkan carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Investasi di green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate pajak karbon escalation timeline
MAS: Perkuat climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate energi terbarukan targets
Engage through available parlementer channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN lingkungan cooperation frameworks
Advokasi melalui Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Dorong untuk IMO shipping emisi standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — lingkungan regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — regulator energi. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a parlementer republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small anggota UE ekonomi ($73B PDB). Manufaktur pada 19.4% PDB. Jasa pada 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). anggota UE since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong lingkungan awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Ketika soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Ketika subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam exhaustive monoculture melemah.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Kembangkanment). Membuat W dapat dihitung.

Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Laporkan ke ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
Laporkan ke Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)
Dokumentasikan melalui Slovenian lingkungan organizations (Focus, Umanotera)
Agricultural cooperatives: Terapkan organic and integrated farming practices
Dairy industry: Terapkan manure management standards
Food processors: Source from diversified farming operations
Ministry of Agriculture: Perkuat CAP eco-scheme implementation
ARSO: Tegakkan nitrate directive compliance
ARSKTRP: Condition payments on biodiversity measures
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Poslanec in the Državni zbor (90 members) untuk menuntut stronger CAP eco-scheme implementation
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advokasi melalui Alpine Convention for sustainable mountain agriculture
i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Kembangkanment. Focus — lingkungan NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. anggota UE since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European anggota UE ($140.9B PDB). Manufaktur pada 16.3% PDB — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Jasa pada 60%. anggota UE since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Ketika per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Ketika consumers can identify ultra-processing, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam opaque ingredient lists melemah.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.
a: Laporkan ke ŠVPS (Štátna veterinárna a potravinová správa — State Veterinary and Food Administration)
Laporkan ke ÚVZ SR (Úrad verejného zdravotníctva — Public Health Authority)

ŠVPS: Perkuat food composition standards
Ministry of Agriculture: Support local food production incentives
