Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy UPF reduction targets
Advokasi melalui WHO Europe for ultra-processed food regulation
i: ŠVPS — the food safety authority. ÚVZ SR — public health authority monitoring dietary health outcomes.
Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Kembangkanment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. anggota UE since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African ekonomi ($32.8B PDB). Pertanian pada 16.6% PDB. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Perikanan crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe penangkapan ikan berlebihan by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Ketika per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Reformasi fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Ketika EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam penangkapan ikan berlebihan melemah.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke DPSP (Direction de la Protection et de la Surveillance des Pêches)
Dokumentasikan melalui ICSF (International Collective in Support of Fishworkers)
Report IUU (Illegal, Unreported, Unregulated) fishing to CNSP (Centre National de Surveillance des Pêches)
Foreign fishing companies: Comply with Senegalese fishing access terms
Fish processing companies: Terapkan sustainable sourcing certification (MSC)
Artisanal fishing cooperatives: Support co-management of nearshore zones
Ministry of Perikanan: Reformasi fishing access agreements with EU and China
CRODT (Centre de Recherches Océanographiques de Dakar-Thiaroye): Publish stock assessments
CSRP (Sub-Regional Perikanan Commission): Coordinate regional management
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Député in the Assemblée nationale (165 members) untuk menuntut reform of foreign fishing access agreements
Support CSRP regional fisheries management plans
Advokasi melalui AU-IBAR for African fisheries sovereignty
Dorong untuk RFMO (Regional Perikanan Management Organization) quotas reflecting stock sustainability
i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Perikanan and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B PDB). Limited economic data available. Rente hutan 11.24% PDB (charcoal — major deforestasi driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Ketika charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to deforestasi data, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Ketika the ban is effectively enforced, the kepentingan tumpang tindih between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade melemah.
Satellite deforestasi monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.
a: Laporkan ke UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea
Dokumentasikan melalui Somali lingkungan organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes
Gulf state importers (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman): Tegakkan import bans on Somali charcoal
Alternative energy providers: Investasi di LPG distribution as charcoal substitute
Federal Government of Somalia: Tegakkan charcoal export ban
Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports
UN SEMG: Perkuat monitoring of charcoal trade networks
Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening
Dorong untuk alternative livelihoods funding through UN Somalia programs
Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute lingkungan programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors sanksi including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN sanksi framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American ekonomi ($35.4B PDB). Jasa pada 61% PDB. Pertanian pada 4.4%. Manufaktur pada 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of PDB). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Ketika CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Ketika sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unregulated pesticide/herbicide use melemah.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Laporkan ke MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Terapkan worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Terapkan mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Investasi di worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Advokasi melalui PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Dorong untuk ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — lingkungan regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated ekonomi ($23.6B PDB). Pertanian pada 43.1% PDB — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Rente minyak 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Ketika oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Ketika reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam opaque extraction melemah.
Oil revenue flow transparansi as condition of reconstruction assistance and sanksi relief. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in lingkungan standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document lingkungan damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Terapkan lingkungan standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on lingkungan and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Advokasi melalui UN-led political process for resource revenue transparansi
Dorong untuk lingkungan damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian ekonomi ($19.5B PDB). Rente minyak 16.75% PDB. Pertanian pada 37.7%. Rente hutan 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue transparansi mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Ketika oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Restore oil revenue transparansi mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Dokumentasikan melalui international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Laporkan ke international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Terapkan lingkungan and transparansi standards
Savannah Energy: Terapkan EITI-aligned reporting
Pipeline operators: Publish transport revenue data
SHT (Société des Hydrocarbures du Tchad): Restore revenue transparansi
Ministry of Petroleum: Tegakkan lingkungan regulations
EITI: Support Chad's path to reinstatement
Support international pressure for oil revenue transparansi
Advokasi melalui African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Dorong untuk World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission lingkungan programs
i: Note: Chad's masyarakat sipil space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue transparansi coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African ekonomi ($10.7B PDB). Pertanian pada 21.3% PDB. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Jasa pada 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate pertambangan (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Ketika per tambang lingkungan data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Ketika export markets require cadmium limits, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unprocessed phosphate extraction melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Laporkan ke ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Dokumentasikan melalui community organizations in phosphate pertambangan regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Investasi di cadmium removal technology
Terapkan mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
Terapkan international lingkungan reporting standards
Ministry of Mines: Perkuat lingkungan conditions in pertambangan permits
ANGE: Tegakkan lingkungan impact assessment requirements
ITIE-Togo: Expand to lingkungan data disclosure
Engage through available parlementer channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS lingkungan governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Dorong untuk EITI full membership with lingkungan disclosure
i: ANGE — national lingkungan management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — pertambangan oversight. ANGE — lingkungan assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to parlementer system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian ekonomi ($526.5B PDB). Manufaktur pada 24.3% PDB (automotive, electronics, food processing). Pertanian pada 8.7%. Jasa pada 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Ketika per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators melemah kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.
a: Laporkan ke Thai FDA (Food and Drug Administration)
Dokumentasikan melalui Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth)
Report misleading health claims to OCPB (Office of the Consumer Protection Board)
CP Group (Charoen Pokphand): Reformasiulate products to reduce ultra-processing
Thai Union: Terapkan transparent nutritional labeling
Retailers: Promote shelf placement for whole foods
Thai FDA: Extend labeling to cover ultra-processing indicators
Ministry of Public Health: Perkuat sugar tax and UPF marketing restrictions
ThaiHealth: Fund UPF health impact research
Hubungi perwakilan Anda สมาชิกสภาผู้แทนราษฎร (Member of the House of Representatives, 500 members) untuk menuntut UPF labeling reform
Support ASEAN food labeling harmonization
Advokasi melalui WHO SEARO for ultra-processed food regulation
Dorong untuk Codex Alimentarius UPF classification standards
i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a monarki konstitusional. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian ekonomi ($14.2B PDB). Mining 7.09% PDB (gold, silver, antimony). Pertanian pada 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of PDB from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's pertambangan sector includes artisanal gold pertambangan with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Ketika per-facility emisi and lingkungan data are published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Ketika aluminum and gold buyers require lingkungan compliance verification, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unregulated production melemah.
Per-facility lingkungan monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride emisi and gold pertambangan mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. TALCO smelter emisi can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.
a: Report through international partner channels (IFC, EBRD)
Dokumentasikan melalui Central Asian lingkungan networks
Report through EITI channels (Tajikistan is a candidate country)
TALCO (Tajik Aluminum Company): Investasi di emisi reduction technology
Gold pertambangan companies: Terapkan mercury-free processing
International buyers: Require lingkungan compliance in supply contracts
Committee for Environmental Protection: Perkuat lingkungan enforcement
Ministry of Industry: Require TALCO emisi modernization
EITI Tajikistan: Expand to lingkungan data
Support international pressure for lingkungan standards in Tajik pertambangan through EBRD and IFC project conditionality
Advokasi melalui OSCE lingkungan dimension for monitoring support
Dorong untuk Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal pertambangan
Support EITI candidacy advancement with lingkungan disclosure
i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for lingkungan reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik pertambangan.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold pertambangan includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — lingkungan regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively negara satu partai (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed ekonomi ($51.4B PDB). Manufaktur pada 18% PDB. One of the world's most otoriter states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Ketika methane data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Ketika buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unmonitored gas production melemah.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Membuat W dapat dihitung without government cooperation.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.
a: Report through international channels only — no domestic masyarakat sipil exists
Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations
Dokumentasikan melalui Crude Accountability or Turkmen.news (exile media)
CNPC (Central Asia-China gas pipeline): Account for upstream methane in lifecycle emisi
International engineering firms: Include methane mitigation in infrastructure contracts
Buyers: Apply methane intensity standards to Turkmen gas
UNEP IMEO: Continue satellite monitoring and public reporting
Global Methane Pledge signatories: Press for engagement with Turkmenistan
IEA: Include Turkmenistan in methane tracker reports
Support satellite-based methane monitoring that bypasses government opacity
Advokasi melalui UNEP for Turkmenistan's engagement with the Global Methane Pledge
Dorong untuk methane intensity standards in international gas trade
Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent masyarakat sipil, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting lingkungan issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an otoriter state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African ekonomi ($51.3B PDB). Pertanian pada 9.7% PDB. Rente minyak 1.55%. Manufaktur pada 14.8%. Jasa pada 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack transparansi. Ketika per ladang lingkungan and revenue data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue transparansi. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to PDB but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam opaque revenue management.
Per-field lingkungan monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.
a: Laporkan ke ANPE (Agence Nationale de Protection de l'Environnement)
Dokumentasikan melalui Tunisian lingkungan organizations (FTDES — Forum Tunisien pour les Droits Économiques et Sociaux)
Report through ETAP compliance channels
ETAP (Entreprise Tunisienne d'Activités Pétrolières): Terapkan revenue transparansi standards
Investasi di solar energy transition
International partners (ENI, OMV): Apply home-country ESG standards to Tunisian operations
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy: Terapkan hydrocarbon revenue transparansi
ANPE: Perkuat lingkungan monitoring at production sites
ANME (Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Énergie): Accelerate energi terbarukan targets
Engage through available parlementer channels — Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple (161 members); note limited legislative independence under current governance
Support EU-Tunisia cooperation on energy transition
Advokasi melalui Union for the Mediterranean for energi terbarukan investment
Dorong untuk EITI membership as governance transparansi measure
i: ANPE — lingkungan protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on lingkungan justice. Tunisia has relatively active masyarakat sipil despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and energi terbarukan agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income ekonomi ($1,359.1B PDB). Manufaktur pada 16.8% PDB. Jasa pada 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Pertanian pada 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Ketika coal plant health costs are internalized, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Ketika coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant emisi and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Laporkan ke ÇŞB (Çevre, Şehircilik ve İklim Değişikliği Bakanlığı — Ministry of Environment, Urbanization and Climate Change)
Dokumentasikan melalui TEMA Vakfı (Turkish Foundation for Combating Soil Erosion)
Report through Greenpeace Mediterranean Turkey office
EÜAŞ (Elektrik Üretim A.Ş.): Kembangkan coal phase-out timeline
Private coal operators: Investasi di renewable alternatives
Industrial companies: Switch to renewable electricity procurement
EPDK (Enerji Piyasası Düzenleme Kurumu — Energy Market Regulatory Authority): Reformasi tariffs to reflect lingkungan costs
ÇŞB: Terapkan emission standards aligned with EU IED
EMRA: Support energi terbarukan investment framework
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Milletvekili in the Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi (600 members) untuk menuntut coal phase-out timeline and health cost accounting
Advokasi melalui G20 for coal phase-out commitments
Dorong untuk EU CBAM preparation to accelerate industrial decarbonization
Support NATO Green Defence Framework lingkungan standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish lingkungan NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy ekonomi ($25.6B PDB). Rente gas 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% PDB. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Manufaktur pada 14.4%. Jasa pada 59.2%. Parliamentary demokrasi.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam fossil fuel dependence melemah naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Ketika production costs rise on mature fields, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam fossil fuel dependence melemah as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility emisi and lingkungan monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Laporkan ke EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Laporkan ke MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Dokumentasikan melalui Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (lingkungan NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Kembangkan gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Terapkan carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process emisi
EMA: Perkuat air quality monitoring around Point Lisas
MEEI: Kembangkan energi terbarukan framework
RIC (Regulated Industries Commission): Reformasi energy pricing
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (41 members) untuk menuntut economic diversification and energi terbarukan policy
Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Advokasi melalui Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Dorong untuk IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active lingkungan NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary demokrasi with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African ekonomi ($78.8B PDB). Pertanian pada 23.3% PDB. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Rente hutan 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Jasa pada 29.6%. Growing ekonomi with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold pertambangan (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Ketika per tambang lingkungan data is published alongside revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and transparansi requirements. Ketika enforced alongside lingkungan monitoring, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam opaque extraction melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mercury-free artisanal pertambangan and improved tailings management reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke NEMC (National Environment Management Council)
Laporkan ke Mining Commission
Dokumentasikan melalui LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)
Twiga Minerals (Barrick/Government JV): Terapkan international lingkungan standards
AngloGold Ashanti (Geita Gold Mine): Terapkan enhanced tailings management
Tanzanite One: Publish lingkungan and community impact data
Mining Commission: Tegakkan lingkungan conditions in pertambangan licenses
NEMC: Perkuat lingkungan impact assessment requirements
TEITI: Expand to include lingkungan data
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Mbunge in the Bunge la Tanzania (393 members) untuk menuntut lingkungan enforcement in pertambangan
Support EITI enhanced reporting with lingkungan data
Advokasi melalui EAC for regional pertambangan lingkungan standards
Dorong untuk Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal pertambangan
i: NEMC — otoritas lingkungan. Mining Commission — pertambangan sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian lingkungan law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue transparansi advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government pertambangan entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected ekonomi ($190.7B PDB). Mining 5.32% PDB. Belanja militer 34.48% PDB (wartime). Pertanian pada 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. kandidat UE country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive lingkungan damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's pertambangan sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive lingkungan damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent lingkungan standards. Ketika reconstruction lingkungan data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring lingkungan standards in post-war reconstruction. Ketika reconstruction adheres to EU lingkungan acquis, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam rapid but dirty rebuilding melemah.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: Laporkan ke Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
Dokumentasikan melalui OSCE lingkungan monitoring
Report war-related lingkungan damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): Terapkan EU-aligned lingkungan standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global lingkungan standards
Reconstruction companies: Terapkan green building and lingkungan remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Tegakkan lingkungan standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: Reformasi pertambangan licensing with lingkungan conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support lingkungan governance capacity building
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) untuk menuntut lingkungan standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference lingkungan commitments
Advokasi melalui EU accession process for lingkungan chapter prioritization
Dorong untuk international lingkungan damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related lingkungan destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related lingkungan damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and pertambangan group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — pertambangan licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires lingkungan acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. kandidat UE country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (lingkungan damage documentation).

UG.s: East African ekonomi ($53.9B PDB). Pertanian pada 24.6% PDB. Rente hutan 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Ketika project-level lingkungan data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Ketika banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unscrutinized pipeline construction melemah. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project lingkungan impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create lingkungan risk.
a: Laporkan ke NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Dokumentasikan melalui international lingkungan organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels
TotalEnergies: Terapkan comprehensive biodiversity offsets for Tilenga (inside Murchison Falls NP)
CNOOC Uganda: Terapkan international lingkungan standards for Kingfisher
Banks: Apply Equator Principles to EACOP financing decisions
PAU (Petroleum Authority of Uganda): Tegakkan lingkungan conditions in production licenses
NEMA: Perkuat lingkungan monitoring of oil projects
MEMD (Ministry of Energy and Mineral Kembangkanment): Ensure transparent revenue management
Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing
Advokasi melalui European Parliament for TotalEnergies duty of vigilance enforcement (French Loi de Vigilance)
Dorong untuk EITI membership with lingkungan disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary lingkungan issues
i: NEMA — otoritas lingkungan. Note: Ugandan lingkungan activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American ekonomi ($81B PDB). Pertanian pada 6.4% PDB. Jasa pada 65.3%. Rente hutan 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong demokrasi — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Ketika soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.

Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
Laporkan ke RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
Dokumentasikan melalui Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: Perkuat soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: Terapkan pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): Tegakkan mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: Perkuat lingkungan assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Diputado in the Cámara de Representantes (99 members) or Senador in the Cámara de Senadores (30 members) untuk menuntut enforcement of the Soil Conservation Law
Support Mercosur lingkungan cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
Dorong untuk soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian ekonomi ($115B PDB). Rente gas 11.04% PDB. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Pertanian pada 18.3%. Manufaktur pada 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Ketika per ladang production and domestic consumption data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Ketika domestic gas prices reflect market value, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam underpriced energy melemah.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.
a: Laporkan ke State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection
Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels
Dokumentasikan melalui international partner organizations
Uzbekneftegaz: Publish per ladang production and lingkungan data
Navoi Mining (NMMC): Terapkan international lingkungan standards for gold and uranium pertambangan
Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure
Ministry of Energy: Terapkan gas price reform roadmap
Goskomekologiya: Perkuat lingkungan enforcement at pertambangan and gas facilities
EITI Uzbekistan: Expand to lingkungan data disclosure
Engage through Oliy Majlis (parliament) — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (150 members) and Senate (100 members)
Support EITI enhanced reporting with lingkungan data
Advokasi melalui EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
Dorong untuk Aral Sea lingkungan restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — lingkungan regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.

Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold pertambangan.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — lingkungan regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea lingkungan disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent ekonomi in crisis ($119.8B PDB — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and sanksi. The kepentingan tumpang tindih is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the kepentingan tumpang tindih — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue transparansi is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international sanksi monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly emisi-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
Dokumentasikan melalui exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international sanksi enforcement authorities
International oil companies with remaining interests (Chevron, Repsol, ENI): Apply lingkungan standards to limited operations
Chevron: Publish per-facility lingkungan data for Venezuela operations
Service companies: Maintain lingkungan standards in contracted work
OFAC: Maintain sanksi conditionality linked to governance reform
EU: Coordinate sanksi policy
OPEC: Address Venezuela's production reporting transparansi
Support international sanksi conditionality requiring democratic governance and lingkungan standards
Advokasi melalui Lima Group/International Contact Group for governance reform
Dorong untuk PDVSA operational and lingkungan transparansi as condition of sanksi relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to masyarakat sipil.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela sanksi. EU — maintains sanksi. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing ekonomi ($476.4B PDB). Manufaktur pada 24.4% PDB. Pertanian pada 11.9%. Rente batubara 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Rente hutan 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the kepentingan tumpang tindih away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Ketika JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant emisi and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Laporkan ke MONRE (Bộ Tài nguyên và Môi trường — Ministry of Natural Resources and Environment)
Dokumentasikan melalui VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)
EVN (Electricity of Viet Nam): Accelerate Power Kembangkanment Plan VIII renewable targets
PVN (PetroVietnam): Investasi di offshore wind
International manufacturers (Samsung, Intel): Demand renewable electricity procurement options
MOIT (Ministry of Industry and Trade): Terapkan PDP VIII renewable targets
MONRE: Perkuat emission standards for coal plants
JETP Secretariat: Accelerate disbursement of transition funding
Support JETP implementation monitoring through international partner coordination
Advokasi melalui ASEAN for regional energy transition cooperation
Dorong untuk JETP transparansi and accountability mechanisms
Support World Bank and ADB energi terbarukan financing for Viet Nam
i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese masyarakat sipil (within party framework). Note: independent masyarakat sipil is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal pertambangan company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Kembangkanment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets energi terbarukan targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a negara satu partai (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan ekonomi ($11.2B PDB). Manufaktur pada 12.6%. Rente batubara 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Pertanian pada 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. kandidat UE status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Ketika lingkungan compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant emisi and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.
a: Laporkan ke AMMK (Agjencia për Mbrojtjen e Mjedisit të Kosovës — Kosovo Environmental Protection Agency)
Dokumentasikan melalui INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels
KEK (Korporata Energjetike e Kosovës): Plan Kosovo A decommissioning and Kosovo B modernization or replacement
Investasi di solar and wind capacity
Terapkan just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot pertambangan communities
ERO (Energy Regulatory Office): Reformasi tariffs to incentivize renewable investment
MMPH (Ministry of Environment): Tegakkan emission standards
Energy Community Secretariat: Hold Kosovo accountable for compliance
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Deputet in the Kuvendi i Kosovës (120 members) untuk menuntut Kosovo A decommissioning timeline and energi terbarukan investment
Support EU integration benchmarks on lingkungan standards
Advokasi melalui Energy Community for just transition support
Dorong untuk World Bank and EBRD financing of energi terbarukan replacement
i: AMMK — lingkungan protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Kembangkanment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, milik negara, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — regulator energi. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan ekonomi ($401.1B PDB). Rente batubara 2.44% PDB. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). Manufaktur pada 12.8%. Jasa pada 63%. Constitutional demokrasi. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Ketika coal plant health costs are internalized, the kepentingan tumpang tindih breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Ketika renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant emisi, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate emisi.
a: Laporkan ke DFFE (Department of Forestry, Perikanan and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
Dokumentasikan melalui Public Protector complaints
Eskom: Terapkan coal plant decommissioning schedule aligned with IRP 2019
Mining companies (Exxaro, Thungela, Seriti): Kembangkan coal transition plans
Renewable IPPs: Scale deployment to replace coal capacity
NERSA (National Energy Regulator): Reformasi tariffs to reflect coal externalities
DFFE: Tegakkan Minimum Emission Standards without further postponements
DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (400 members) or NCOP (National Council of Provinces, 90 members) untuk menuntut Eskom emission standard compliance
Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
Advokasi melalui BRICS for just energy transition principles
Dorong untuk climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African lingkungan justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest lingkungan law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal pertambangan. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal pertambangan. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — regulator energi. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional demokrasi, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African ekonomi ($25.3B PDB). Mining 28.25% PDB — one of the highest pertambangan dependencies globally (copper). Rente hutan 6.78%. Jasa pada 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper pertambangan generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Ketika per tambang lingkungan data is published, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: Mining royalty reform with lingkungan earmarking. Ketika pertambangan revenue is partly allocated to lingkungan remediation, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam externalizing pollution costs melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Copper smelting emisi can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: Laporkan ke ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
Dokumentasikan melalui community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through pertambangan company compliance channels
First Quantum Minerals (Kansanshi): Terapkan international lingkungan standards
Barrick Gold (Lumwana): Terapkan enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state pertambangan holding): Require lingkungan compliance from partners
ZEMA: Tegakkan emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: Perkuat lingkungan conditions in pertambangan licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include lingkungan data
Hubungi perwakilan Anda Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) untuk menuntut lingkungan enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with lingkungan data
Advokasi melalui SADC for regional pertambangan lingkungan standards
Dorong untuk responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — lingkungan management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Kembangkanment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Kembangkanment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African ekonomi ($41.5B PDB). Mining 4.24% PDB (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Pertanian pada 8.7%. Manufaktur pada 15.6%. Rente hutan 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's pertambangan sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Ketika per tambang lingkungan data is published alongside revenue, W menjadi dapat dihitung.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Ketika EU buyers require lingkungan verification, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam unregulated extraction melemah.
Per-mine lingkungan monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Dapat dipatahkan sebagian. Lithium pertambangan (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce ketergantungan sistem.
a: Laporkan ke EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
Dokumentasikan melalui ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international pertambangan company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): Terapkan international lingkungan standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): Terapkan responsible lithium pertambangan practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned lingkungan standards
Ministry of Mines: Tegakkan lingkungan conditions in pertambangan licenses
EMA: Perkuat lingkungan impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining Kembangkanment Corporation): Require lingkungan compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available parlementer channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
Advokasi melalui SADC Mining Protocol for regional lingkungan standards
Dorong untuk EITI membership to improve pertambangan transparansi
i: EMA — lingkungan management agency. ZELA — lingkungan law organization. Note: masyarakat sipil space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium pertambangan (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Kembangkanment. EMA — lingkungan regulation. ZMDC — state pertambangan company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest ekonomi ($18,743.8B PDB). Manufaktur pada 24.9% PDB — global factory floor. Rente batubara 0.61%. Industri pada 36.5%. Jasa pada 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more energi terbarukan annually than any other country. Ketika renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Ketika existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the kepentingan tumpang tindih breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant emisi data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: Laporkan ke MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial lingkungan protection bureaus
Dokumentasikan melalui 12369 lingkungan complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
Investasi di grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
Advokasi melalui COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
Dorong untuk national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central otoritas lingkungan. 12369 hotline — lingkungan complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate lingkungan data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All milik negara, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Kembangkanment and Reformasi Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a negara satu partai — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced ekonomi ($1,875.4B PDB). Manufaktur pada 26.6% PDB (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Jasa pada 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant demokrasi.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Ketika carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the kepentingan tumpang tindih breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Ketika carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, kepentingan yang tumpang tindih dalam coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant emisi and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Membuat W dapat dihitung.
Tidak dapat dipatahkan. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Laporkan ke Ministry of Environment (환경부)
Dokumentasikan melalui KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): Terapkan coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: Perkuat K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): Reformasi merit order to disadvantage coal
Hubungi perwakilan Anda 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) untuk menuntut coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
Advokasi melalui OECD for coal finance phase-out
Dorong untuk G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — otoritas lingkungan. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest lingkungan NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national emisi). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
